evals.prompt: In the Drupal password_strength module, what is the plugin id of the password_policy constraint it provides, and what single setting does that constraint expose?
How does the Drupal password_strength module measure a password, and what is the range of the strength score it enforces via the password_policy constraint?
Which library does the Drupal password_strength module use to estimate password strength, and how does password_strength plug that score into Drupal? Name the module it integrates with.

This site already has a Password Policy configured that uses the Password Strength constraint. Inspect the live site configuration and tell me the machine id of that policy and the minimum strength score the Password Strength constraint requires.
Look at the Password Policy named 'ps_eval_probe' on this site. Which password constraint plugin does it apply, and to which user role is the policy assigned?

Create a Password Policy config entity named 'strong_password' that applies the password_strength module's password_strength_constraint with a minimum strength_score of 4 (very strong), assigned to the authenticated role.

I want to force everyone who logs into my site to pick a really strong password — the strongest possible rating. Using the password strength feature that's installed, set up a password rule that rejects anything that isn't rated the maximum strength.
